title: Visual petrified oak slab
description: Сhanges the texture of the petrified oak slab so that it can be distinguished
body:
# Visual petrified oak slab

**[Petrified oak slab](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/Petrified_Oak_Slab) (it's vanilla) and oak slab have the same texture, so this resource pack changes it so that they can be distinguished**


Also check [Petrified oak slab craft
](https://modrinth.com/datapack/petrified-oak-slab-craft). That's all!
